scenario.name: Basic Sipstone UAC
scenario.send:
INVITE sip:[field1]@[field3]:5075 SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: "RAJ"<sip:[field0]@[field2]>;tag=[call_number] To: "AKASH"<sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 INVITE Contact: <sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Allow: UPDATE,PRACK,INFO,NOTIFY,OPTIONS,BYE,INVITE,ACK,CANCEL Supported: 100rel, timer, replaces Max-Forwards: 70 Min-SE: 90 Session-Expires: 1800;refresher=uac Subject: Performance Test User-to-User: 00FA080001001056965CFB;encoding=hex Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=user1 53655765 2353687637 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 0 8 101 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000/1 a=rtpmap:101 telephone-event/8000 a=sendrecv

ACK sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sip:[field0]@[field2];tag=[call_number] To: sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port][peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 ACK Contact: <sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Max-Forwards: 70 [routes] Subject: Performance Test Content-Length: 0

SIP/2.0 200 OK [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:];tag=[call_number] [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] Require: timer Session-Expires: 90;refresher=uas Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port]> Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=user1 53655765 2353687637 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 0 8 101 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000/1 a=rtpmap:101 telephone-event/8000 a=inactive

SIP/2.0 200 OK [last_Via:] [last_CSeq:] [last_From:] [last_To:] [last_Call-ID:] Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port]> Session-Expires: 1800;refresher=uac Supported: 100rel, timer, replaces Require: timer

SIP/2.0 200 OK [last_Via:] [last_CSeq:] [last_From:] [last_To:] [last_Call-ID:] Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port]> Session-Expires: 1800;refresher=uac Supported: 100rel, timer, replaces Require: timer

BYE sip:[field1]@[field3]:5075;transport=[transport] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sip:[field0]@[field2];tag=[call_number] To: sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port][peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] Contact: <sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> CSeq: 3 BYE [routes] Max-Forwards: 70 Subject: Performance Test Content-Length: 0
